title: rule-audit: Static prompt audit for LLM system prompts
description: rule-audit is a static-analysis CLI for the AI reliability layer that audits LLM system prompts for silent failure modes — logical contradictions, coverage gaps, priority ambiguities, meta-rule paradoxes, and absoluteness issues — deterministically and offline, with no LLM calls and no network access, generating the concrete attack scenario for each finding so prompt bugs are caught in CI before they ship.
